name: A curry twist on a tuna and rice casserole.

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Preheat an oven to a heat of 175°C/350°F.
In a big bowl, mix mustard powder, curry powder, milk and cream of celery
soup. Mix onion, tuna and rice into the soup mixture. Put into a casserole
In a bowl, mix parsley, melted butter and breadcrumbs. Sprinkle on tuna
In preheated oven, bake casserole for about 25 minutes till breadcrumb
mixture is golden brown. Put sliced eggs on top. Put it back into the oven.
Bake for 5 more minutes. Before serving, cool casserole for 5 minutes.
This can be a very good vegan or vegetarian main dish. In Thailand,
